page.content: In the 3rd Quarter of 2023, SF Express reported Last-Mile Delivery Costs aggregating to INR 500,000 million, with a Delivery Volume of 500,000, Total Revenue of $1.2M, Operating Expenses of $900, and a Net Profit of $600, reflecting a Delivery Efficiency of 10.0%, a Cost per Delivery of $3,000, and a Growth Rate of 15.3%.

lines.text: In the 3rd Quarter of 2023, SF Express reported Last-Mile Delivery Costs aggregating to INR 500,000 million, with a Delivery
Volume of 500,000, Total Revenue of $1.2M, Operating Expenses of $900, and a Net Profit of $600, reflecting a Delivery
Efficiency of 10.0%, a Cost per Delivery of $3,000, and a Growth Rate of 15.3%.

page.content: Comparatively, in Q2 2023, the Delivery Volume was 480,000, with Total Revenue at $1.4M, Operating Expenses of $850, a Net Profit of $550, Delivery Efficiency of 9.5%, Cost per Delivery at $2,800, and a Growth Rate of 15.0%. In Q1 2023, the figures were a Delivery Volume of 460,000, Total Revenue of $1.35M, Operating Expenses of $800, Net Profit of $500, Delivery Efficiency of 9.0%, Cost per Delivery at $2,600, and a Growth Rate of 14.5%. For Q4 2022, Delivery Volume was 450,000, Total Revenue was $1.3M, Operating Expenses were $750, Net Profit was $480, Delivery Efficiency was 8.5%, Cost per Delivery was $2,500, and Growth Rate was 14.0%.

lines.text: Comparatively, in Q2 2023, the Delivery Volume was 480,000, with Total Revenue at $1.4M, Operating Expenses of $850, a
Net Profit of $550, Delivery Efficiency of 9.5%, Cost per Delivery at $2,800, and a Growth Rate of 15.0%. In Q1 2023, the
figures were a Delivery Volume of 460,000, Total Revenue of $1.35M, Operating Expenses of $800, Net Profit of $500,
Delivery Efficiency of 9.0%, Cost per Delivery at $2,600, and a Growth Rate of 14.5%. For Q4 2022, Delivery Volume was
450,000, Total Revenue was $1.3M, Operating Expenses were $750, Net Profit was $480, Delivery Efficiency was 8.5%, Cost
per Delivery was $2,500, and Growth Rate was 14.0%.

page.content: In Q3 2022, Delivery Volume reached 440,000, with Total Revenue at $1.25M, Operating Expenses of $700, Net Profit of $450, Delivery Efficiency of 8.0%, Cost per Delivery at $2,400, and a Growth Rate of 13.5%. The transport modes for the Asia-Pacific region included Road with a Volume of 15,000 tons and a Percentage Change of 5%, Rail with 12,000 tons, Air with 8,000 tons and a Percentage Change of 3%, leading to a Total Volume of 35,000 tons and a Quarterly Change of 10%, with a Forecasted Volume of 40,000 tons, Status On Track, and an Average Cost of INR 1500 per ton. The Cost per Ton was $100, with a Market Share of 25% and a Growth Rate of 8%, Customer Satisfaction at 90%, and Service Level at 95%, alongside a Delivery Time of 2 Days, Capacity Utilization at 80%, Operational Efficiency at 92%, and Regulatory Compliance at 100%, with a Low Environmental Impact and an Investment of $200M towards Future Plans to Expand Services.

lines.text: In Q3 2022, Delivery Volume reached 440,000, with Total Revenue at $1.25M, Operating Expenses of $700, Net Profit of $450,
Delivery Efficiency of 8.0%, Cost per Delivery at $2,400, and a Growth Rate of 13.5%. The transport modes for the Asia-
Pacific region included Road with a Volume of 15,000 tons and a Percentage Change of 5%, Rail with 12,000 tons, Air with
8,000 tons and a Percentage Change of 3%, leading to a Total Volume of 35,000 tons and a Quarterly Change of 10%, with a
Forecasted Volume of 40,000 tons, Status On Track, and an Average Cost of INR 1500 per ton. The Cost per Ton was $100,
with a Market Share of 25% and a Growth Rate of 8%, Customer Satisfaction at 90%, and Service Level at 95%, alongside a
Delivery Time of 2 Days, Capacity Utilization at 80%, Operational Efficiency at 92%, and Regulatory Compliance at 100%,
with a Low Environmental Impact and an Investment of $200M towards Future Plans to Expand Services.
